# Michael Huang — michaelhuang.ca

Michael Huang is an AI-native full-stack engineer and consultant based in Vancouver, BC, Canada.
He is the founder of SI8 Technology (si8tech.com) and a Product Developer at Traction Complete.

## Identity
- Full name: Michael Huang
- Location: Vancouver, BC, Canada
- Personal site: https://www.michaelhuang.ca
- Consulting company: https://www.si8tech.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sibulus0/
- GitHub: https://github.com/sibulus13
- Business contact: info@si8tech.com

## Positioning
AI-native full-stack engineer and AI consultant (Vancouver, BC) with a Mechatronic Systems Engineering background.
Builds agentic AI, AI automation, and RAG chatbot systems; ships production-grade software 2–3× faster using agentic AI workflows (Claude Code, Cursor).
Available for consulting engagements and senior full-stack engineering roles.

## Education
- BASc Mechatronic Systems Engineering, minor Computer Science — Artificial Intelligence
  Simon Fraser University, Burnaby, BC, Canada
- Certified ScrumMaster (CSM) — Scrum Alliance
- Career Essentials in Generative AI — Microsoft / LinkedIn Learning (Sep 2024)

## Experience (most recent first)
- Product Developer, Traction Complete (Aug 2025 – present)
  Introduced agentic AI workflows (Claude Code, Cursor); 2–3× feature delivery velocity increase.
  30% AWS infrastructure cost reduction via Lambda and CDK optimization.
  30% reduction in development cycle time via automated code review and test generation.
  Stack: TypeScript, AWS Lambda, AWS CDK, Datadog, Bitbucket CI/CD

- Founder & Principal Engineer, SI8 Technology (Jan 2025 – present)
  Full-stack engineering consultancy focused on AI automation and production web systems.
  Built Playwright purchasing automation pipeline — 300% faster than manual (testing, not production).
  Stack: TypeScript, React, Playwright, Python, Claude API

- Full Stack Software Engineer, GrainFox (Oct 2022 – Jan 2024)
  Platform scaled to 5,000+ active agricultural organizations.
  80% reduction in manual data entry; 70% processing time reduction; 99.9% uptime.
  Built AI-driven content recommendation system for user feed personalization.
  Stack: Vue.js, Django, Python, PostgreSQL, JavaScript, Salesforce

- Robotic Developer, MapaRobo (Oct 2021 – Mar 2022)
  Cross-platform React Native mobile app for remote robot monitoring and control via ROS.
  95% bug-free deployment rate; 15% reduction in robot navigation time.

- Control Engineer Co-op, Ballard Power Systems (Jan 2020 – Aug 2020)
  LabVIEW SCADA and PID control systems for hydrogen fuel cell test stands.
  30% test cycle time reduction; automated aggregate plant consumption reporting.

## Key metrics (verified)
- 2–3× engineering velocity via agentic AI workflows (Traction Complete)
- 30% AWS infrastructure cost reduction (Traction Complete)
- 80% reduction in manual data entry (GrainFox)
- 99.9% platform uptime (GrainFox)
- 5,000+ organizations served (GrainFox)
- 300% faster purchasing automation (SI8 Technology — testing only, not production)

## Featured projects
- Tarive: AI-powered personal finance platform. Auto-connects to bank accounts via Plaid,
  categorizes transactions with AI, surfaces life-cost annotations and 20-year net worth projections.
  Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, Plaid, Claude API. Live: https://tarive.vercel.app/home

- Prompt Studio: Chrome extension for multi-step AI prompt workflows.
  Privacy-first, browser-native, supports dynamic templates and prompt chaining.
  Stack: React, Plasmo, Chrome Extension APIs, OpenAI API, Anthropic API.
  Live: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/prompt-studio/gggdidjaokfggaabjgalcncclnppanih

- Nightfalls: Sunset quality forecasting for photographers and golden-hour chasers.
  Live: https://www.nightfalls.ca

## Core skills
TypeScript, Next.js, React, React Native, Python, AWS Lambda, AWS CDK, Supabase,
PostgreSQL, Claude API, OpenAI API, Playwright, Selenium, Vue.js, Django,
agentic workflow design, AI integration, cloud architecture

## Availability
Open to: consulting engagements (via SI8 Technology), senior full-stack engineering roles,
AI integration projects, agentic development consulting.
Contact: info@si8tech.com | https://www.si8tech.com/#contact
